dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: The capitol of Ostania, Berlint.

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: This old woman is a contact for Westalis's intelligence agency, WISE.

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: This man's name is Loid Forger,

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: otherwise known by his code name, Twilight.

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: His occupation: spy.

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: It appears as though, on top of the current important mission he is conducting,

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: he's been given another.

dialogue.name: Old woman
dialogue.speech: This has been my life for decades now.

dialogue.name: Old woman
dialogue.speech: Every day remains the same, and peace is fleeting.

dialogue.name: Old woman
dialogue.speech: Will we ever see a day

dialogue.name: Old woman
dialogue.speech: when we're not needed anymore?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Mission complete.

dialogue.name: Contact
dialogue.speech: Good day, or perhaps, good evening, Twilight.

dialogue.name: Contact
dialogue.speech: We thank you for completing that mission so quickly.

dialogue.name: Contact
dialogue.speech: How goes Operation Strix?

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: That is his top-priority mission to maintain peace between the East and the West.

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: That mission...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: It's going smoothly.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I have secured both a wife and child.

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: ...is meant to bring the enemy country's plans for w*r to light,

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: establish a family in said country, and infiltrate a certain academy.

dialogue.name: Contact
dialogue.speech: Very good. Not standing out is an iron-clad rule for a spy.

dialogue.name: Contact
dialogue.speech: Continue acting as a completely mundane family.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I know.

dialogue.name: Contact
dialogue.speech: Did you quit smoking?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Well, I have a child now.

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: And thus, the Forgers came to be without issue, but...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Loid did mention that he was going to be late,

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: so why don't we eat out tonight?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Yep.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Doctors sure are busy. It must be difficult.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa is not actually a doctor.

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: His daughter, Anya, whom he just happened to adopt from an orphanage...

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa's real job is a spy.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Today, he went to take down an arms dealer.

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: ...is an Esper who can read minds.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I bring you my dish!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Thank you very much, Miss Anya.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Hmm... It's just not washing off...

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: His wife, Yor, who agreed to this arrangement because of a common interest...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I can still smell the blood from yesterday's k*ll.

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: ...is a hardcore assassin.

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: A spy, a telepath, and an assassin.

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: The three decided to live under one roof

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: for their own reasons while concealing their true identities,

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: and so their less-than-mundanefamily life continues on.

dialogue.name: sign___OPERATION_STRIX
dialogue.speech: ,PENGUIN PARK

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I keep getting all these extra missions every day, on top of Operation Strix.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: HQ must be in dire straits over the personnel shortage.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: When I get home, I have my pretend family to deal with.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I am an agent. Therefore, my soul has no time to rest.

dialogue.name: Wife A
dialogue.speech: Hey, don't you think the husband across the hall must be in trouble?

dialogue.name: Wife A
dialogue.speech: It's supposed to be a day off, but he's working late into the night again.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: They're our neighbors...

dialogue.name: Wife B
dialogue.speech: And they have a little child. That poor, neglected thing.

dialogue.name: Wife C
dialogue.speech: I rarely see the three of them together.

dialogue.name: Wife B
dialogue.speech: He's probably off cheating somewhere!

dialogue.name: Wife B
dialogue.speech: How awful!

dialogue.name: Wife A
dialogue.speech: Maybe he actually got fired, and he can't bring himself to go home.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I was careless.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I was so consumed by my other missions

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: that I neglected playing the role of the father well.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Even the slightest suspicion or mistrust from those around us in a deception operation

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: can be detrimental.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I must do everything I can to remedy this situation.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: A threat to our family is a threat to the world!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: We're going out next weekend!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: The three of us will have a good time. Where do we want to go?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Oh? Is that a penguin, Anya?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I know. Let's go to the aquarium.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Um... You seem exhausted. Why not get some rest?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Yor, in order for our pretend marriage to continue,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: we must do everything we can to seem like a normal, happy family.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: So look forward to the weekend!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: So exciting!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I need to take care of all of my other missions before then.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Well... let's go.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Loid, perhaps you really should get some rest.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm perfectly fine.

dialogue.name: Wife C
dialogue.speech: Oh, if it isn't the Forgers.

dialogue.name: Wife C
dialogue.speech: It's so rare to see all of you together.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: We're about to go enjoy some time together at the aquarium.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Isn't that exciting, Anya?

dialogue.name: Wife D
dialogue.speech: I see...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: We need to show our neighbors what a happy family we are

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: so they don't ever suspect that we're a pretend family.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: My papa, who is taking us on an ooting,

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: and my mama, who is very kind to my papa, are both very good people.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I think our family is completely normal.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: That sounded more like an explanation than anything else, but good enough.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Now, then...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: If you'll excuse us.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Please wait, Papa, who is a very good and normal person!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Ba-donk ka-chonk!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Another summons? I have a bad feeling about this.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm going to go buy us some drinks.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: All right.

dialogue.name: Old woman
dialogue.speech: Agent Twilight, we've got another additional mission for you tod—

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I cannot.

dialogue.name: Old Woman
dialogue.speech: This is straight from WISE HQ—

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I cannot. Today is a very important day for Operation Strix.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: We need to hurry, or the aquarium will go out of business!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Don't worry, they just remodeled the place.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Just wait patiently.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: There you have it.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Anyway, I'll take one coffee, one juice—

dialogue.name: Old woman
dialogue.speech: Hang on! Did you say "aquarium"?

dialogue.name: Old woman
dialogue.speech: Splendid, Agent Twilight.

dialogue.name: Old woman
dialogue.speech: The location of this mission just happens to be Berlint Aquarium!

dialogue.name: Old woman
dialogue.speech: I am blown away at how prepared you are!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: No, really. This was a coincidence.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Could I get that coffee and juice now?

dialogue.name: Old woman
dialogue.speech: There will be some intel traded at the aquarium—

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: My coffee and juice, please.

dialogue.name: Old woman
dialogue.speech: Listen to me carefully, Twilight.

dialogue.name: Old woman
dialogue.speech: This intel contains instructions from another country for making a new chemical weapon.

dialogue.name: Old woman
dialogue.speech: If t*rrorists get their hands on this information,

dialogue.name: Old woman
dialogue.speech: many will perish in our country!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: So many... fishies!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: An octopus!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Starfish.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: A tiny shark!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: She looks like she's having fun.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Loid...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: You look so pale. Are you all right?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I ended up taking the mission.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: But we did successfully show the neighbors how well we get along.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: As long as I can get through this separate mission...

dialogue.name: Wife A
dialogue.speech: Oh, if it isn't the Forgers from across the hall.

dialogue.name: Wife A
dialogue.speech: What a coincidence.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Oh, hello.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: You can't... be serious!

dialogue.name: Wife A
dialogue.speech: We just got here, too.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Now I definitely can't relax.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Actually, we just need to shoo them off, and—

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Would you like to join us?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Yor!

dialogue.name: Wife A
dialogue.speech: What a great idea.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa is funny.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: If we want to appear normal,

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: we need to keep up a good relationship with our neighbors.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Very well, then.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'll take care of this mission immediately, and then return to weekend mode.

dialogue.name: flashback Old woman
dialogue.speech: According to our intel,

dialogue.name: Old woman
dialogue.speech: they smuggled in a capsule containing film by making a penguin swallow it.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Why a penguin?

dialogue.name: Old woman
dialogue.speech: It was brought in sometime yesterday at an unknown time.

dialogue.name: Old woman
dialogue.speech: The recipient has not appeared yet.

dialogue.name: Old woman
dialogue.speech: You must retrieve the goods before the enemy organization does, no matter what!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Why don't we check out the penguin exhibit?It seems to be the main attraction.

dialogue.name: Wife A and B
dialogue.speech: Okay.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I like penguins! I wanna see!

dialogue.name: Announcer
dialogue.speech: Welcome to the world's biggest penguin park!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: P-P-P-Penguins!

dialogue.name: Announcer
dialogue.speech: Our most recommended attraction at this aquarium

dialogue.name: Announcer
dialogue.speech: is our adorable underwater show that stars penguins!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Exactly which penguin is my target?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: There's no time to check each and every penguin.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'd have a better chance of stopping the t*rror1st from obtaining the film...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: No... Since I don't know when the recipient is going to show up,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: that'll be difficult, as well.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I won't be able to keep an eye on all of these penguins alone.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: What am I going to do?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: There has to be something...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: They must've marked the penguin somehow to tell it apart from the others.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa is troubled.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Loid is so enthusiastic. I guess he lets his inner child out sometimes, too.

dialogue.name: Man's voice A
dialogue.speech: Hey, that fish looks tasty.

dialogue.name: Woman's voice
dialogue.speech: Wait, where did my kid go?!

dialogue.name: Man's voice B
dialogue.speech: I hope my girlfriend stops being so angry.

dialogue.name: Penguin's voice A
dialogue.speech: Fish...

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: It's hard to read the minds of penguins.

dialogue.name: Penguin's voice B
dialogue.speech: Let's play.

dialogue.name: Penguin's voice C
dialogue.speech: I'mma eat some fish.

dialogue.name: Penguin's voice D
dialogue.speech: I'm hungry.

dialogue.name: Penguin's voice E
dialogue.speech: Come over here.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa, that penguin looks like it can't breathe.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: It's drinking a lot of water only to spit it all back out.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: It's possible there's something stuck in its throat.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: This is definitely worth investigating.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Sorry. I'm going to go buy some drinks real quick.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Loid... His exhaustion must be making him so thirsty.

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: Hey! Where's the new guy we're supposed to get today?

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: He's this late on his first day?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Sorry I'm late!

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: What's wrong with you young'uns today?

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: I'll show you how to feed the penguins. Follow me.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Yes, sir!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: The fastest way to get closer to the target penguin without causing a commotion

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: is to disguise myself as one of the aquarists.

dialogue.name: Sign
dialogue.speech: Agent Twilight's Specialty: Disguises

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: The first thing a newbie has to learn is all of the penguins' faces and names.

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: Did you memorize the roster?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Yes. I glanced through it quickly in the staff room.

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: You glanced through? You moron!

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: Even with me, it took two years to learn all ...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Oh, Chief. You're about to step on poor Petilda behind you.

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: This is indeed Petilda.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: This one is Pemas, and this is Pescar.

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: How can you tell, newbie?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Huh? Well, all of their patterns are completely different.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Their faces and heights, too.

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: Even I still mistake them every once in a while.

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: I can't believe this guy's observation skills and memory.

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: All right, then. Let's get to feeding them.

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: This way.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: The penguin I spotted earlier is...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Right there. Parles, the emperor penguin.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I need to get to him immediately and...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Wh-Wha?!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I-I can't go any further.

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: We've got big eaters and fussy eaters.

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: Each penguin has unique eating habits, so pay attention.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I don't have time for this.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I need to hurry back, or the neighbors will be suspicious.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Chief!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Allow me to do the honors!

dialogue.name: Chief and Aquarist
dialogue.speech: What?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I figured this out watching veteran aquarists...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: The most important thing is how each penguin eats.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: How much they eat, what kind of food it is,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: and where each group is located.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: As long as I can figure these things out...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Controlling the masses is mere child's play.

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: That's no ordinary newbie!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Uh-oh. Apparently Parles isn't very hungry.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: He might be sick, so I'll take him to the treatment room.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: If you'll excuse me for a bit.

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: S-Sure...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Sorry, little guy.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Bingo! There's something stuck in his throat.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Upon closer observation, it seems there's a mark on the bottom of his foot, too.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Just a second, little guy. I'll get it out for you.

dialogue.name: Man from Org
dialogue.speech: You there.

dialogue.name: Man from Org
dialogue.speech: What are you planning to do with that penguin?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: He's not feeling well, so I'm taking him to the treatment room.

dialogue.name: Man from Org
dialogue.speech: I see. Allow me to do that for you.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm terribly sorry. Only staff are allowed to handle them.

dialogue.name: Man from Org
dialogue.speech: My apologies.

dialogue.name: Man from Org
dialogue.speech: I'm a professor from Berlint University's marine biology research lab.

dialogue.name: Man from Org
dialogue.speech: I'm in charge of the marine animals here.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: This ID is fake.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: It's not even well-made.

dialogue.name: Man from Org
dialogue.speech: Who do you work for, you—

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: You're not getting away!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Hey, be still!

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: Hey, newbie!

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: Where are you taking that penguin?

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: The treatment room is that way!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I can't carelessly let him go without knowing how many enemies are here.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: My top priority is retrieving this film.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'll have to give up on chasing after him.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Oh, no... Now where did Miss Anya run off to?

dialogue.name: Man from Org
dialogue.speech: I need to let my comrades outside know to k*ll that man,

dialogue.name: Man from Org
dialogue.speech: and retrieve the film—

dialogue.name: Man from Org
dialogue.speech: Who the hell are you?!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Mama! I'm being kidnapped!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Miss Anya?!

dialogue.name: Man from Org
dialogue.speech: Let go of me!

dialogue.name: Man from Org
dialogue.speech: What are you talking ab—

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: What do you think...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: you're doing to my daughter?!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Wow.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Are you all right?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Oh, no. I definitely overdid it.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I hope he's not dead...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Wow.

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: And so, Twilight was able to retrieve the film

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: and get information about the enemy organization from the man they captured.

dialogue.name: Wife A
dialogue.speech: You know, your husband hasn't come back at all.

dialogue.name: Wife A
dialogue.speech: I'm telling you, he's cheating!

dialogue.name: Wife
dialogue.speech: How awful!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Huh? That's not...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm sorry I took so long!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Loid!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Ta-da!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: A penguin!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Oh, what a big stuffed penguin! Where did you get it?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: It was a prize from the penguin name-guessing challenge they were doing over there.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I just had to get it for Anya, so I kept trying over and over.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Boy, it sure was difficult.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa is a liar. He actually got it in one try.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: He got so worked up. How adorable.

dialogue.name: Wife A
dialogue.speech: You're a better father than I thought.

dialogue.name: Wife A
dialogue.speech: I'm impressed.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: You flatter me.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm just a simple father trying not to stumble around too much

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: It's bigger than you, Miss Anya.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: as I protect my happy little family.

dialogue.name: Wife A
dialogue.speech: Now that I've gotten a closer look at you, you're quite handsome.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Looks like things are going to work out here, too.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: But I'm absolutely done with all this excessive overwork.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm going to file a complaint to HQ and request a long vaca—

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: No...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Maintaining a world where children don't cry...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: A world with no w*r...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: That is my duty.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I have no time to stand by idly.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa! The dolphin show is gonna start!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Sorry, could you walk a little slower?

dialogue.name: Newbie aquarist
dialogue.speech: What?! You want me to be the chief?!

dialogue.name: Newbie aquarist
dialogue.speech: But why?!

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: I have nothing more to teach you.

dialogue.name: Chimera (Anya)
dialogue.speech: I am Director Chimera, the boss of the secret organization P.

dialogue.name: Chimera
dialogue.speech: So you're the new recruit, eh?

dialogue.name: Penguin (Anya)
dialogue.speech: I am called Penguin, please, and I come from the aquarium.

dialogue.name: Penguin
dialogue.speech: It is a pweasure to meet your acquaintenance.

dialogue.name: Chimera
dialogue.speech: Indeed.

dialogue.name: Chimera
dialogue.speech: Agent Anya, you know what to do.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Yep!

dialogue.name: Chimera
dialogue.speech: We have a ritual in which we both eat the halves of a split peanut.

dialogue.name: Chimera
dialogue.speech: Once you have completed this task,

dialogue.name: Chimera
dialogue.speech: you will be officially recognized as a member of this organization.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Om...

dialogue.name: Chimera
dialogue.speech: Starting today, you will be known as Agent Penguinman.

dialogue.name: Chimera
dialogue.speech: Do your best for peace.

dialogue.name: Penguin
dialogue.speech: Yep.

dialogue.name: Chimera
dialogue.speech: Agent Anya, show our new agent around our hideout.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Okey-dokey!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: This is our hideout's command room.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: We gather intel from this machine every day.

dialogue.name: Sign
dialogue.speech: * She watches cartoons

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: This is Agent Papa. He is a super-elite that can do anything.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Um... what? Is she pretending to be a spy?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: This is Agent Mama.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: She's strong, but fails at everything else.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Am I that much of a failure?!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: They are Anya's trusted lackeys.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Okay, onward to the next spot.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: It looks like Miss Anya has taken quite a liking to that plushie.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Mm...

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: This is the bathroom!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: You can heal your wounds from battle here.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: This is Anya's room. I train in here every day.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: And...

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: The most top-secret spots in our hideout.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa's room and Mama's room!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Be on your guard.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: If you discover the secret of these rooms, you won't leave alive.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: We might find the ultimate knife, or the ultimate b*mb!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Now, then...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Hey! What do you think you're doing?!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: How many times have I told you not to go in there without permission?!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Er, it's just, there's a lot of dangerous things in there, like scissors and heaters.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Honestly, there are far more dangerous things in there.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Yes, you shouldn't go in mine, either.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: My room has poisoned needles and such.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa and Mama, I hate you both!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Anya's gonna run away from home!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Not good. At this rate, Operation Strix is going to collapse!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: What should I do?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: A-Agent Anya!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: There's no time for crying! World peace is on the line!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: L-Let's wrap up the tour of the hideout and head out for our next mission!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Y-Yes! Let's go beat the bad guys!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Okay! Follow me, you two!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: The bad guys have taken over the candy store on nd Street.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Let's go save them!

dialogue.name: Loid and Yor
dialogue.speech: Huh?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Be careful.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: The enemy might have set traps.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: W-Well done, Agent Anya.

dialogue.name: Townsperson
dialogue.speech: What is that?

dialogue.name: Townsperson
dialogue.speech: Aw, what a sweet family.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: A spy must not stand out...

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: Later on, Anya's mood improved after they bought her a snack,

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: and peace was restored to the Forger household.
